    All Companies (5)

    Credit Saint

    Premium credit repair with a 90-day money-back guarantee, escalated dispute strategies, and three service tiers to match your budget.

    4.1/5
    $79.99/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back

    Best for: Consumers who want a mid-range credit repair service with escalating dispute tactics, People who value a clearly defined 90-day money-back guarantee

    View Details

    Lexington Law

    Attorney-led credit repair firm with legal expertise in consumer credit law. One of the most recognized names in credit repair, now operating under a restructured model.

    3.8/5
    $99.95/mo BBB: C+

    Best for: Consumers with complex credit issues that may involve legal violations, People dealing with identity theft or mixed credit files

    View Details

    Sky Blue Credit Repair

    Budget-friendly credit repair with no setup fees, simple flat-rate pricing, and a 90-day money-back guarantee. The longest-running credit repair company in the industry.

    4.0/5
    $79.00/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back

    Best for: Budget-conscious consumers who want effective credit repair without overpaying, Couples who both need credit repair and want to save with a joint plan

    View Details

    The Credit People

    Affordable credit repair with a unique flat-rate 6-month option at $419, offering significant savings over monthly billing. Low $19 setup fee makes getting started easy.

    4.0/5
    $79.00/mo BBB: B+ Money-Back

    Best for: Consumers who want a flat-rate option to cap their total credit repair spending, Budget-conscious individuals looking for the lowest possible setup fee

    View Details

    The Credit Pros

    Full-service credit repair with credit monitoring, identity theft protection, and a money-back guarantee across all three bureaus.

    4.3/5
    $119.00/mo BBB: A+ Money-Back

    Best for: First-time credit repair clients wanting full-service coverage, Consumers who want credit monitoring bundled with repair services

    View Details
